END, [f].[CreatedAt]
FROM [FoodItems] AS [f]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [f].[CategoryId] = [c].[CategoryId]
WHERE [f].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [f].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)

SELECT [s].[Key] AS [Day], COALESCE(SUM(CAST([s].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[Key]
ORDER BY [s].[Key]

    WHEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [o].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
GROUP BY [o].[FoodItemId], [o].[FoodName], [o].[FoodImageUrl]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) DESC

SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [o].[FoodItemId], [o].[FoodName] AS [Name], [o].[FoodImageUrl] AS [ImageUrl], COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) AS [Quantity], COALESCE(SUM(CAST([o].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [o].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
GROUP BY [o].[FoodItemId], [o].[FoodName], [o].[FoodImageUrl]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(CAST([o].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [o].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) DESC

    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]

    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]

) AS [s]

SELECT [s].[Key] AS [Day], COALESCE(SUM(CAST([s].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0
) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[Key]
ORDER BY [s].[Key]

    ELSE [o].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue]
FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]

SELECT [s].[Key] AS [Day], COALESCE(SUM(CAST([s].[Quantity] AS decimal(18,2)) * CASE
    WHEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] IS NOT NULL AND [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount] > 0.0 THEN [s].[UnitPriceWithDiscount]
    ELSE [s].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue], COUNT(DISTINCT ([s].[OrderId])) AS [Orders]
FROM (
    SELECT [o].[OrderId], [o].[Quantity], [o].[UnitPrice], [o].[UnitPriceWithDiscount], CONVERT(date, [o0].[CreatedAt]) AS [Key]
    FROM [OrderItems] AS [o]
    INNER JOIN [Orders] AS [o0] ON [o].[OrderId] = [o0].[OrderId]
    WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o0].[CreatedAt] >= @__from_Value_1 AND [o0].[CreatedAt] <= @__to_Value_2

) AS [s]
GROUP BY [s].[Key]
ORDER BY [s].[Key]

    ELSE [o].[UnitPrice]
END), 0.0) AS [Revenue]

WHERE [o0].[RestaurantId] = @__restaurantId_0 AND [o0].[CreatedAt] >= @__from_Value_1 AND [o0].[CreatedAt] <= @__to_Value_2
GROUP BY [o].[FoodItemId], [o].[FoodName], [o].[FoodImageUrl]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([o].[Quantity]), 0) DESC
